subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles, and contact addresses from the multi-party contract document

plan.cost_rationale: Single subtask required: The query asks for structured field extraction (party names, roles, contact addresses) from ONE document. This is a straightforward extraction task with no cross-source reconciliation, no multi-tool orchestration, and no policy evaluation needed. Small tier is appropriate because the extraction scope is explicit and bounded—all requested fields come from a single document and do not require inference or complex reasoning across multiple document types or sources.
